original_image_tags: A black-and-white 2-cent United States Postage stamp featuring a profile portrait of Thomas Jefferson. The stamp is affixed to the page. A circular postal cancellation mark is stamped over the stamp and surrounding area; the text within the cancellation is partially legible, showing fragments such as "AIR MAIL" and "CONN."

elements.description: One United States postage stamp, 2 cents, featuring a portrait of a profile head. A circular postmark cancellation is stamped over the left side of the stamp, with the visible letters 'BRI' and 'ONI' and the number '2'.

judge.reason: The descriptions quote contradictory text from the postmark cancellation: one reads 'AIR MAIL' and 'CONN' while the other reads 'BRI' and 'ONI' and '2'.
